hero.title:
Learn with a mentor
who's always there
hero.subtitle: AI tutor for 13 subjects: history, math, physics, chemistry and more. Explains, answers, remembers. Free.

landing.heroTitle: Forget boring textbooks. Learn in dialogue.
landing.heroSubtitle: An AI mentor who knows your level, remembers you, and explains things your way. History, math, physics and 11 more subjects.
landing.demoChatSub: Ask the question you couldn't say out loud
landing.tip1Title: Didn't get it? Ask for a different explanation
landing.tip1Desc: 'Explain it like I'm a beginner' — Mentora will rephrase the answer
landing.tip2Desc: Mentora will check what you know and what you don't
landing.tip3Title: At the end — ask 'what did I learn'
landing.tip3Desc: Mentora will summarize your session in 3–5 key points
landing.howIntroSub: No lectures, no boring tests. Just live dialogue — you ask, Mentora explains.
landing.ctaLine1: At your own pace. Ask anything.
landing.subjectsSubtitle: From school curriculum to exam preparation
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps from your first question to real progress
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just an online textbook. A live mentor working only for you.
landing.ctaSubtitle: First 20 messages per day — free. No card required.

01.title: Open and try immediately
01.desc: No registration required. Ask your first question and get a detailed answer in a second.

02.title: Choose your subject
02.desc: 13 topics from school curriculum to exam prep. Switch anytime — your progress is saved.

03.title: Mentora remembers you
03.desc: Your style, level, pace. No need to re-explain yourself — Mentora already knows how to talk with you.

04.title: Progress becomes visible
04.desc: XP, streaks, levels per subject. See how far you've come — that's what keeps you going.

05.title: Prepare for what matters
05.desc: Exam mode with real tasks and readiness tracker. Launching summer 2026.

security.title: Ask without fear
security.desc: Conversations are encrypted with AES-256 — the same standard used by banks and Apple Pay. Data is never shared with third parties or used for advertising. Ask the question you wouldn't type into Google.

memory.title: Learns alongside you
memory.desc: Mentora's contextual memory remembers every conversation: your level, gaps, and style. With each session, explanations become more precise. Personalized learning is 76% more effective than standard.*

supportive.title: Always on your side
supportive.desc: Won't judge, won't tire, won't get frustrated. Explains the same thing a third time from a different angle, supports you when things get tough, and genuinely celebrates when you succeed. That's how a real mentor works.

ai.title: Top AI lab quality
ai.desc: Mentora runs on frontier models — the same transformer architecture powering the world's leading AI companies. RAG-retrieval, multi-level context and a specialized stack make answers more accurate than any search engine.

global.title: Knowledge without borders
global.desc: A student from India, a kid from Siberia, or an adult from Berlin — you can learn from anywhere, without a teacher or schedule. Streaks, levels and XP turn daily studying into a habit, not a chore.

price.title: Do the math
price.desc: 8 sessions with a tutor per month or unlimited access to Mentora — the choice is obvious.

hero.title: Start free.
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
